signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Undershot Forecasts of 2.4%) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, below market expectations of 2.4% and with core inflation easing to 2.2% from 2.3%.[2][3][4] Monthly CPI increased 0.3%, weaker than the 0.6% forecast, despite petroleum jumps offset by falling agricult

signals.headline: House Oversight Democrat Robert Garcia Calls for Elon Musk Testimony on Epstein Files | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
House Oversight Democrat Robert Garcia Calls for Elon Musk Testimony on Epstein Files | YES | MED confidence**

Democratic Rep. Robert Garcia, ranking member on the House Oversight Committee, stated lawmakers should hear from **Elon Musk** about his knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein's activities, citing Musk's confidence in Steve Bannon's involvement and Epstein documents mentioning Musk.[1]
